identity.name: 365Scores
identity.summary: Real-time sports scores and news app, based in Tel Aviv, Israel.

company.blurb: 365Scores makes a real-time sports-tracking app for scores, stats, and personalized match news.
company.direction: Acquired by Minute Media and has been integrating into its broader sports-media and content network over the past year.

process.detail: 60 min · product sense on a sports-app feature

watch_fors: Consumer scale — millions of MAU, so metrics literacy and retention thinking matter.
Personalization and notifications are core; expect product-sense on engagement without spamming.
Sports domain fluency is a plus but they grade for product judgment.
Post-acquisition, expect questions on working across a larger media org.
Mobile-first product instincts are graded heavily.
